title: The Amazing Formation of Deadvlei

scenes.text: This dry lake bed is home to ancient blackened trees.
This is Deadvlei, located in the Namib Desert, Namibia.
The trees in this surreal landscape have been dead for over 900 years.
The contrast of white clay and orange dunes creates a stunning visual.
scenes.label: STUNNING CONTRAST

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Deadvlei, Namib Desert - Namibia. A surreal landscape filled with ancient blackened trees against a backdrop of orange dunes. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
